description: Referencing the distressed leather aesthetic of the Wild West, this pair of sandals from id are crafted to add a subtle polish to your off-duty ensemble. Wear this with rolled up jeans and an understated tee. Upper Criss-cross leather straps for durability and comfort Mid foot over-the-foot colourful strap in woven fabric for added attraction, support and comfort Leather toe separator for more comfort and moisture-absorption Leather detailing on leather strap for added attraction Midsole Firm footbed for extra support in all-day wear Branding on footbed Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Textured waffle patterned lugs all over the footbed for improved grip on all surfaces Flex grooves for ease of movement Sandal care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
